---
title: "About"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="about-content">
  <img src="images/headshot.jpg" alt="Michael Lopez" class="headshot" onerror="this.style.background='linear-gradient(135deg, #8B4D3B 0%, #C4724D 100%)'; this.style.display='block';">

  <h2>Hi, I'm Michael</h2>

  <p>
    I'm a data scientist with a deep commitment to place-based social impact work.
    For over [X] years, I've worked in the nonprofit sector, using data to help
    communities understand themselves and drive meaningful change.
  </p>

  <p>
    My work sits at the intersection of data science, geography, and social justice.
    I believe that good data work isn't just about technical skills—it's about
    understanding community context, centering equity, and building tools that
    genuinely serve the people who use them.
  </p>

  <h3>What I Do</h3>

  <p>
    I specialize in building interactive maps, dashboards, and data products that
    make complex information accessible and actionable. Whether it's helping a
    community organization understand neighborhood change, or building a tool for
    residents to find local resources, I focus on creating solutions that meet
    real needs.
  </p>

  <h3>Technical Skills</h3>

  <div class="skills-grid">
    <div class="skill-category">
      <h4>Languages & Tools</h4>
      <ul>
        <li>R (tidyverse, sf, ggplot2)</li>
        <li>Python</li>
        <li>SQL</li>
        <li>Git/GitHub</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="skill-category">
      <h4>Web & Visualization</h4>
      <ul>
        <li>Shiny</li>
        <li>Quarto</li>
        <li>Leaflet</li>
        <li>Mapbox</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="skill-category">
      <h4>Data & Analysis</h4>
      <ul>
        <li>Geospatial Analysis</li>
        <li>Statistical Modeling</li>
        <li>Data Visualization</li>
        <li>Census/ACS Data</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="skill-category">
      <h4>Domain Expertise</h4>
      <ul>
        <li>Community Development</li>
        <li>Housing & Neighborhoods</li>
        <li>Education & Youth</li>
        <li>Health Equity</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>

  <h3>Let's Connect</h3>

  <p>
    I'm always interested in connecting with others doing place-based data work,
    exploring new projects, or just chatting about maps and community impact.
  </p>

  <p>
    <a href="mailto:your.email@example.com">your.email@example.com</a><br>
    <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/yourusername" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a> ·
    <a href="https://github.com/yourusername" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
  </p>
</div>
```
